name: Jhon Keneth Ryan Namias
title: Full Stack Engineer & AI Automation Specialist
summary:
I'm a full-stack engineer and AI automation specialist focused on building intelligent systems that drive real efficiency. I work across the stack with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and Python — from modern web applications to end-to-end AI-powered automation pipelines.

I currently serve as Project Manager at MASH and Head of the Technical Committee at the University of Caloocan City, leading technical strategy and cross-functional teams. I've built automation tools for global firms like Wilshire Financial Network and developed custom solutions using Eleven Labs and LLM integration to replace manual workflows with streamlined, automated processes.

Beyond development, I'm active in the cybersecurity space. As a competitor in HackForGov 2025, I sharpen my skills in web exploitation and digital forensics to keep the systems I build secure. I hold verified certifications from HackerRank in Software Engineering and React.js.

I live by "Learning by Doing" — always building, always shipping, and always looking for the next high-impact project to work on.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
